title: Howd they spear Lilith
wikitext:
[]: How'd they spear Lilith?             Quote Post by Shamonan » Sun Apr 15, 2007 6:04 pm Anyone know how NERV managed to crucify Lilith inside the Black Moon? If the freakin' Second Impact happened by shrinking Adam, I don't know what horrible thing could have occurred if the Lance of Longinus wasn't used against Lilith. If it's so big though, and Evas weren't deployed until Sachiel arrived, how'd NERV do it? Could it be Adam who sealed Lilith up in the Black Moon before he went on a trip to Antarctica? It's true that their marriage wasn't exactly picture-perfect...

[]: Re: How'd they spear Lilith?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Apr 15, 2007 6:17 pm Shamonan wrote: Anyone know how NERV managed to crucify Lilith inside the Black Moon?

[]: Re: How'd they spear Lilith?             Quote Post by Shamonan » Sun Apr 15, 2007 6:22 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Shamonan wrote: Anyone know how NERV managed to crucify Lilith inside the Black Moon?

[]:             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Apr 15, 2007 6:23 pm Rei w/Unit 00 did the job. Episode 14.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Apr 15, 2007 6:31 pm Lilith's soul wasn't inside her, it was in Rei, so she had no ATF. I imagine most of the cruci/lancifying went on after that. It's an interesting question of what they did with her when she did have a soul. Or did she have a soul when they found her? Perhaps it was like Adam's during 2nd impact and "flew out of her" at some point?

[]:             Quote Post by Shamonan » Sun Apr 15, 2007 6:57 pm LOL, flying souls... Sort of reminds me of that 'exorcism' scene from South Park...

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Apr 15, 2007 6:57 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: It's an interesting question of what they did with her when she did have a soul. Or did she have a soul when they found her? Perhaps it was like Adam's during 2nd impact and "flew out of her" at some point?

[]:             Quote Post by Shamonan » Sun Apr 15, 2007 7:02 pm Yeah, how can you capture a soul? Maybe some sort of electomagnetic net was used like the one seen in Magma Diver.

[]:             Quote Post by kaworu_nagisa » Sun Apr 15, 2007 7:04 pm I'm guessing a giant crane. Who knows.

[]:             Quote Post by Shamonan » Sun Apr 15, 2007 7:15 pm NERV salvaged Shinji's soul and reformed his body after he dissolved into Unit-01's Entry Plug, right? They probably used the same technology.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Apr 15, 2007 8:19 pm Shamonan wrote: NERV salvaged Shinji's soul and reformed his body after he dissolved into Unit-01's Entry Plug, right? They probably used the same technology.

[]:             Quote Post by Shamonan » Sun Apr 15, 2007 8:32 pm But it didn't work on her. Besides, it was her they were trying to fish out initially. For some reason it worked on Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 15, 2007 8:37 pm Shamonan wrote: But it didn't work on her. Besides, it was her they were trying to fish out initially. For some reason it worked on Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by Jay911 » Sun Apr 15, 2007 9:18 pm Ghostbuster ghost trap? I too was wondering how souls got transferred other than thru, say, Yui and/or Kyoko's CEs. For example, Rei I/00....

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Apr 15, 2007 9:47 pm Jay911 wrote: Ghostbuster ghost trap?

[]:             Quote Post by Shamonan » Mon Apr 16, 2007 6:24 am Ah, so NERV's salvage didn't work after all... Unit-01 saves the day yet again, I guess... As for the Ghostbusters being contracted by NERV... Well, I think it goes without saying that Lilith looks quite a bit like Mr. Staypuft.

[]:             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Mon Apr 16, 2007 6:41 am Why does it matter anyway ? :P I don't have an answer for such a question and nor do anybody else have .. Neither do i think Anno actually considered explaining this in the show . Make your own Story and start believing in it !

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Mon Apr 16, 2007 7:42 am Coded to the Core wrote: Make your own incomprehensible and ridiculously complicated fanwank, and start believing in it !

[]:             Quote Post by Morzella » Mon Apr 16, 2007 11:48 am I suspect they offered the lance to Lilith as a toothpick. then said to her "you have a little something on your chest there". Lilith goes to brush it away and accidently spears herself. Job done.

[]:             Quote Post by Coded to the Core » Mon Apr 16, 2007 1:25 pm BrikHaus81 wrote: Coded to the Core wrote: Make your own incomprehensible and ridiculously complicated fanwank, and start believing in it !

If it's so big though, and Evas weren't deployed until Sachiel arrived, how'd NERV do it? Could it be Adam who sealed Lilith up in the Black Moon before he went on a trip to Antarctica? It's true that their marriage wasn't exactly picture-perfect...
